key_signals.signal: Shows inventory levels but is 6 days out of date; SKU001 and SKU002 already below reorder levels on May 7th
key_signals.credibility_reason: Data is structured but 6 days old, making it an unreliable indicator of current stock

key_signals.signal: Delivery of bulk orders for Falak Basmati Rice and Mezan Cooking Oil is delayed by 5-7 days due to road transport issues
key_signals.credibility_reason: Direct, official communication from the supplier regarding a specific disruption

key_signals.signal: Shows a recent surge in daily sales volume, particularly for SKU001 and SKU002 over the last 3 days
key_signals.credibility_reason: Automated, real-time system data reflecting actual recorded transactions

key_signals.signal: Multiple customers reporting actual stockouts of 25kg Basmati Rice and 5L Cooking Oil at various store branches
key_signals.credibility_reason: Real-time, multi-source corroboration from customers experiencing actual stock unavailability

key_signals.signal: Transport workers' strike on the M-9 motorway is paralyzing freight movement, causing potential shortages
key_signals.credibility_reason: Independent, reputable news source confirming the macroeconomic disruption cited by the supplier

dominant_signal: Stockout risk for SKU001 and SKU002 within 2-3 days
conflict_reason: Reports adequate stock but data is 6 days old
